title: Irish Skillet Potatoes
description: A hearty, comforting dish of crispy, pan-fried Irish potatoes, inspired by traditional Irish cuisine.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in the skillet over medium heat.
2. Peel and slice the Irish potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
3. Add the potato slices to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
4. Remove the potatoes from the skillet and place them on a plate.
5. Sprinkle the potatoes with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the Irish skillet potatoes hot.
